events.description: Three parallel Explore-agent audits (AI / movement / presentation) produced 25 findings. Critical findings #1-3 are confirmed missing-brace bugs in BattalionSyncSystem (x2) and UnitSeparationSystem — same pattern as the four already fixed this session. False positive FP-1 was the agent's claim that FlowFieldMovementHelper lacked a null-field guard; line 57 already has it.
